untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit seasonal pattern detection (pre-planting/growing/harvest phases) and multi-year rolling average comparison (3-year and 5-year windows). Available indicators include only standard moving averages (sma_100, sma_200) which approximate long-term trends but cannot capture true multi-year seasonal cycle identification or distinguish specific agricultural seasonal phases. The comparison logic and seasonal pattern recognition logic cannot be expressed using only the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate the rolling average logic using sma_100 (≈1-year equivalent) and sma_200 (≈2-year equivalent) as proxies for trend comparison, with price crossovers suggesting relative value shifts. However, this does not accurately capture the 3-year/5-year rolling average requirement or the seasonal phase identification that is core to the signal. The signal is fundamentally untranslatable without custom seasonal indicators or multi-timeframe analysis capabilities.
